name: 1997-cis-report-ba825e
title: Managing Customers with Next-Generation Software Applications: 1997 Edition
description: Aberdeen Group's third annual market research report on Customer Interaction Software (CIS), covering over 60 software vendors, market share data, CIS module definitions, technology trends including Web-based architectures and CIS-ERP integration, and forecasts for the CIS market. Authors: Hugh Bishop, Chris Pavlic & Bill Hills. Published October 1997.

contributors.title: Hugh Bishop, Chris Pavlic & Bill Hills (Aberdeen Group)

sources.title: Aberdeen Group Market Research Report, 1997 CIS Edition
